title: Political Stalwart Joins Ace Strategies
excerpt: A former Senior Adviser to South Australian Premier Peter Malinauskas has been appointed as Strategic Counsel at Ace Strategies.
body_paragraphs: Founder and Managing Director Matt Neagle said Kevin Naughton is one of the most accomplished political and media strategists in Australia.

Kevin is an award-winning journalist; he has led newsrooms and government offices throughout Australia and is a renowned strategist for political and industry leaders. For decades Kevin has navigated the intersection of government relations, media influence, and strategic communications.
Mr Naughton has worked as a broadcaster, Chief of Staff and Senior Writer at the Sunday Mail, Business Editor for InDaily, and led political offices for Liberal, Labor and Independent Leaders.

title: Political Powerhouse Appointed Director
excerpt: Former Senior Adviser to State Government Treasurer Stephen Mullighan has joined Ace Strategies as a Director.
image_alt: Mel Jones joins Ace Strategies as Director
body_paragraphs: Founder and Managing Director Matt Neagle said Ms Jones' experience in state and federal public service will be invaluable to clients across Defence, Infrastructure, Health and Retail.
Government and industry leaders have long considered Mel to be an outstanding professional in public policy development, stakeholder engagement, and political strategy.
Ms Jones has worked across Treasury and Finance to Investment and Trade, Defence and Space Industries, Small Business, Veterans' Affairs, Police and Emergency Capabilities, and Sport.
